scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,mobile -c blue,magenta "bun run --filter @my-product/api dev" "cd apps/mobile && flutter run"
scripts.test: bun run --filter @my-product/api test && bun run --filter @my-product/shared test && cd apps/mobile && flutter test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @my-product/shared typecheck && bun run --filter @my-product/api typecheck
